name: Insect Adventure
short_description: In this high speed action focused metroidvania, cute bug critters face off against dark abominations from the abyss. Grab a hammer and unleash fury on soulless beasts while blasting through open ended underground zones where you dictate the pace.
detailed_description: Bugsy the cockroach has had a rough day when his tree was invaded by evil parasitic shadow monsters. To make things worse, a lizardman from underground kidnapped his friend Mayo, believing her sacrifice is the only thing that will stop them! The only thing to do now is grab a hammer and start smashing things until answers start to reveal themselves. Explore vast underground ruins, power yourself up to ridiculous heights, and solve the mystery of where the shadow monsters are coming from in Insect Adventure.
about_the_game: Bugsy the cockroach has had a rough day when his tree was invaded by evil parasitic shadow monsters. supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil
